zh.lifeSummary: 當Lope Díaz I de Haro於大約1107年出生在西班牙拉 利奧亞哈羅時，他的父親Diego López I de Haro38歲，母親María Sánchez Ordoñez33歲。他於大約1135年與?結婚。他去世於1170年5月6日在西班牙艾尤斯卡迪維斯卡亞享年64歲，埋葬在西班牙拉 利奧亞納拉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lope Díaz I de Haro于大约1107年出生在西班牙拉 利奧亞哈羅时，他的父亲Diego López I de Haro38岁，母亲María Sánchez Ordoñez33岁。他于大约1135年与?结婚。他去世于1170年5月6日在西班牙艾尤斯卡迪維斯卡亞享年64岁，埋葬在西班牙拉 利奧亞納拉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Haro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Jesus, Juan, Luis, Salvador, Manuel, Carlos, Jorge, Miguel, Alberto, Francisco, Jaime.
Spanish: habitational name from a place in the province of La Rioja, so called from a North Castilian form of Spanish faro ‘beacon’. Compare De Haro .
In some cases possibly also French: metonymic occupational name for a peddler, from an Old French cry used to hail someone or to attract attention.

variants.name: De Haro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Rafael, Arturo, Jaime, Jesus, Ubaldo, Alfredo, Enrique, Felipe, Francisco, Gustavo, Juan.
Spanish: habitational name, formed with the preposition de ‘from’, for someone from a place called Haro (see Haro ).

variants.name: Haros
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico): probably the plural form of Spanish   Haro  .

nameMeanings.name: Lope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Lupus ‘wolf’, probably adopted as a calque of the Germanic name Wolf .

nameMeanings.name: Díaz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Muslim name, from Persian: ‘prayer; gift or offering’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lope Díaz I de Haro was born about 1107, in Haro, La Rioja, Spain, his father, Diego López I de Haro, was 38 and his mother, María Sánchez Ordoñez, was 33. He married ? about 1135. He died on 6 May 1170, in Biscay, Basque Country, Spain, at the age of 64, and was buried in Nájera, La Rioja, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lope Díaz I de Haro est né environ 1107, à Haro, La Rioja, Espagne, son père, Diego López I de Haro, avait 38 ans et sa mère, María Sánchez Ordoñez, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé ? environ 1135. Il est décédé le 6 mai 1170, à Biscaye, Euskadi, Espagne, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Nájera, La Rioja, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lope Díaz I de Haro um 1107 in Haro, La Rioja, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Diego López I de Haro 38 und seine Mutter María Sánchez Ordoñez 33. Er hat um 1135 ? geheiratet. Er starb am 6. Mai 1170 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Vizcaya, Euskadi, Spanien und wurde in Nájera, La Rioja, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lope Díaz I de Haro è nato il circa 1107 nel Haro, La Rioja, Spagna, il suo padre, Diego López I de Haro, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, María Sánchez Ordoñez, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato ? circa 1135. Morì il 6 maggio 1170, nel Vizcaya, Euskadi, Spagna, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Nájera, La Rioja, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Lope Díaz I de Haroが約1107年にスペインラ リオジャハロで生まれた時，父Diego López I de Haroは38歳，母María Sánchez Ordoñezは33歳であった。約1135年に?と結婚した。彼は1170年5月6日にスペインエウスカジーヴィズケヤで64歳で死去し，スペインラ リオジャンaジャーアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lope Díaz I de Haro(이)가 대략 1107년 스페인 라 리오자 하로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Diego López I de Haro(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 María Sánchez Ordoñez(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1135년 ?(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1170년 5월 6일 스페인 우스카디 비즈카야에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 라 리오자 aj라에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lope Díaz I de Haro nasceu aproximadamente 1107, em Haro, La Rioja, Espanha, seu pai, Diego López I de Haro, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, María Sánchez Ordoñez, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com ? aproximadamente 1135. Ele faleceu em 6 de maio de 1170, em Biscaia, Euskadi, Espanha, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Nájera, La Rioja, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lope Díaz I de Haro родился около 1107 г. в местности харо, ла риоджа, Испания, его отцу по имени Diego López I de Haro было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали María Sánchez Ordoñez, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени ? около 1135 г. Он умер 6 мая 1170 г. в местности визкеия, эускади, Испания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности нaджира, ла риоджа, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lope Díaz I de Haro nació aproximadamente 1107, en Haro, La Rioja, España, su papá, Diego López I de Haro, tenía 38 años y su mamá, María Sánchez Ordoñez, tenía 33 años. Se casó con ? aproximadamente 1135. Murió el 6 de mayo de 1170, en Vizcaya, País Vasco, España, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Nájera, La Rioja, España.
